summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the multiple spins feature for RifaFacil raffle app. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - spin counter badge, spin dialog, reset spins button, and winner/non-winner messaging working correctly.

issues:
HTML nesting warning:
inside DialogDescription (which renders as

). This causes console warning but doesn't affect functionality. Fix: Change DialogDescription children to use instead of

tags

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin - returns is_final_spin=false and show_winner=false for spins 1 and 2
Backend: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin - returns is_final_spin=true and show_winner=true with winning_number on final spin (3)
Backend: Preselected winner is returned correctly on final spin
Backend: Spin fails without sold tickets (400 error)
Backend: Spin fails after winner already set (400 error)
Backend: Spin count persists and increments correctly across API calls
Frontend: ManageRaffle page displays spin counter badge (X / Y giros)
Frontend: Spin dialog shows 'Giro X de Y' header
Frontend: Non-final spins show 'No es el ganador... ¡Sigue girando!' message
Frontend: Final spin shows winner celebration with emoji and GANADOR message
Frontend: Start spin button changes text: 'Girar (X restantes)' → '¡Giro Final!'
Frontend: Reset spins button (Reiniciar giros) works correctly
Frontend: SpinningWheel animation with number trail
Frontend: Toast notifications for spin reset
critical_code_review_comments:
Minor HTML issue: ManageRaffle.js line 553-568 - DialogDescription contains
and

children which causes HTML nesting warning. DialogDescription renders as

element, so children should be inline elements () not block elements
Spin logic correctly handles preselected_winner on final spin (line 481-492 in server.py)
SpinningWheel.js correctly uses isWinnerSpin prop to determine celebration vs non-winner display
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test raffles with test users during pytest execution - all with unique suffixes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple spins feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin (increments spin count, returns is_final_spin/show_winner/winning_number on final spin), POST /api/raffles/{id}/reset-spins (resets counter to 0). Frontend shows spin counter badge, dialog with 'Giro X de Y', appropriate messages for non-winner spins vs final winner spin, and reset button. SpinningWheel component handles targetNumber and isWinnerSpin props for animation and messaging.

features_verified.spin_endpoint: POST /api/raffles/{id}/spin increments current_spin_count and returns appropriate response based on spin number
features_verified.final_spin: Returns is_final_spin=true, show_winner=true, winning_number (from preselected_winner or random sold ticket)
features_verified.spin_counter_ui: Badge shows 'X / Y giros' with remaining spins message
features_verified.spin_dialog: Shows 'Giro X de Y', appropriate messaging, start spin and reset buttons
features_verified.spinning_wheel: Animation with number trail, winner/non-winner visual feedback
